description: Routing-resolution fixtures for the /wf-quick skill (v9.0.0-alpha.2+). Each invocation should resolve to skills/wf-quick/reference/<key>.md based on the first positional token.

fixtures.purpose: rca sub-command with two positional args (incident slug + date).
Original /wf-quick semantics now reached via the explicit 'quick' key.
Stage 1 of the full lifecycle, dispatched via /wf-quick intake.
Sub-command with optional args; bare-key invocation is valid.
Bare /wf-quick should render the menu, not pick a default sub-command.
